thing-type.label: Cloud Logon Helper Thing
thing-type.description: Cloud Logon Helper Thing supporting captcha and 2FA authentication

parameter.name: username
parameter.label: Xiaomi cloud username
parameter.description: Xiaomi cloud username. Typically your email

options.option: With username and password. (possibly requiring captcha and 2fa)

parameter.name: country
parameter.label: Xiaomi server country
parameter.description: Xiaomi server country(s) (e.g. sg,de). Separate multiple servers with comma. Leave empty for all. See binding readme for country to server mapping

parameter.name: cloudDiscoveryMode
parameter.label: Cloud Discovery Mode
parameter.description: Allow for discovery via the cloud. This may be used for devices that are not on the same network as OpenHAB server

options.option: Discover online supported devices from Xiaomi cloud
Discover all on & offline devices from Xiaomi cloud (advanced, see readme for usage)

parameter.name: userId
parameter.label: Xiaomi Cloud User ID
parameter.description: Xiaomi cloud user ID, automatically retrieved at logon

parameter.name: clientId
parameter.label: Xiaomi cloud client Id
parameter.description: Xiaomi cloud client ID identifies this client

parameter.name: serviceToken
parameter.label: Xiaomi cloud service token
parameter.description: Xiaomi cloud service token, automatically retrieved at logon

parameter.name: ssecurity
parameter.label: Xiaomi cloud ssecurity
parameter.description: Xiaomi ssecurity value, automatically retrieved at logon

channel-type.label: Logon/Captcha Image
channel-type.description: Scan QR code for logon or Enter the captcha value in the captcha response channel.

channel-type.label: Captcha Response
channel-type.description: Enter in this channel the value as seen in the captcha.

channel-type.label: 2 Factor Authentication Response
channel-type.description: Enter the 2 factor authentication code received by email.

channel-type.label: Trigger Login
channel-type.description: Turn ON to cancel any in-progress login and start a fresh login sequence (new QR code or captcha). Resets automatically. Has a 30-second cooldown to prevent rapid re-triggering.
